heroes.name: Rian
heroes.prompt: Bust portrait of Rian, living architectural support of moss-covered ruins. Monolithic torso, short thick neck, massive weathered body reading like a load-bearing pillar of stone and bark. Hammer-instrument fused to silhouette as if part of the body, not a held weapon. Materials: basalt-gray skin texture, bark and lichen layered onto garments, rough iron hardware with visible hand-repairs. Calm, heavy expression — no aggression, no bravado, the quiet weight of someone who understands the world through mass and endurance. Dark stone-gray and bark-brown palette, dull iron, pale lichen-green accent. Soft ambient ruin light from above. Premium painterly concept art for desktop Steam tactical RPG, strong readable silhouette at thumbnail size.

heroes.name: Saya
heroes.prompt: Bust portrait of Saya, a silent cut in the world's fabric. Narrow asymmetric silhouette — one side open, one closed — with a long diagonal cutting accent suggesting motion without action. One wing-like or linen-shred opening element trails from the shoulder. Materials: burnt silk in charcoal and deep crimson, fragments of bone and dry pale pollen, dark lacquer surfaces, torn organic edges. Expression: composed to the point of inhuman stillness, gaze precisely focused, no emotion performed — danger in posture and geometry alone. Palette: restrainted crimson-black, bone white, ashen charcoal, faint ember warmth at edges. No glossy color, no decoration for decoration's sake. Premium painterly concept art for desktop Steam tactical RPG, strong readable silhouette.

heroes.name: Noel
heroes.prompt: Bust portrait of Noel, keeper of rain maps — a person for whom knowledge has become a wound. Medium figure with a fragile attentive presence, layered in map-paper and ink-stained textiles that have begun to look like diagrams. A diagonal staff or measuring rod crosses the silhouette. Ribbon and parchment strip elements flutter or fold from garments. Materials: paper, aged parchment, glass-bead accents like caught rain, compass-metal hardware, heavy ink stain marks. Expression: internally focused, collected on the edge of exhaustion, attentive to something just out of frame. Palette: cold blue-gray, pale parchment ivory, ink black, faint glass-highlight silver. Premium painterly concept art for desktop Steam tactical RPG, readable at small size.
